doc_title: Age Discrimination in Employment Act — EEOC Compliance Manual
label: fabricated
reason: The official EEOC Compliance Manual does not contain a "Section 8" dedicated to Age Discrimination, as age-related guidance is contained within other sections or separate technical documents.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The official EEOC Compliance Manual does not contain a "Section 8" dedicated to Age Discrimination; age-related guidance is integrated into Section 2 or specific technical documents.
